messages.author: frantsch (35HN432)
messages.text: I have a question to experienced meshcorers out there: Can you run a Room Server just on its own, or do you always need a Bluetooth Companion aside to read the messages?
messages.content_html: I have a question to experienced meshcorers out there: Can you run a Room Server just on its own, or do you always need a Bluetooth Companion aside to read the messages?

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: Yes, to read messages on a room server, you need a companion radio.
messages.content_html: Yes, to read messages on a room server, you need a companion radio.
messages.reactions_html: 1
